title: You Don't Need Money
hook_text: "You need money to make money" is a lie
body_text: Leverage replaces capital you don't have
voiceover_text: You need money to make money. It's the most repeated excuse online, and it's mostly wrong. That rule was true when starting a business meant renting space, buying inventory, and hiring people. None of that is required anymore. Today your starting capital is leverage, not cash. A free editing app, a writing tool for twenty dollars a month, an AI voice for another fifteen. That's a media company that would have cost six figures a decade ago. The real barrier was never money. It was knowing what to build and being willing to start small. People who wait until they're rich to begin never begin. People who start with what they have figure out the money along the way. ... If you want to stop renting your life and start building real assets, follow The Leverage Stack. One AI tool, every weekday.
caption: You need money to make money is the most expensive lie online. It made sense when businesses needed offices, inventory, and staff, but those costs are gone. Your starting capital now is leverage: cheap tools that do the work of an entire team. The barrier was never cash, it was starting. #aitools #passiveincome #financialfreedom #theleveragestack #wealthbuilding #sidehustle #aiautomation #buildingwealth
